title: BLUELIGHT RAT: Registry Enumeration of Security Products
description: Detects registry access targeting security product and installed software keys. BLUELIGHT enumerates SecurityCenter2, Uninstall keys, and AV registrations to identify defensive tools.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ('Event ID' = 12 or 'Event ID' = 13 or 'Event ID' = 14) and ('Target Object' like '%CurrentVersion\Uninstall%' or 'Target Object' like '%CurrentControlSet\Services%' or 'Target Object' like '%SecurityCenter2%' or 'Target Object' like '%Windows Defender%') and not ('Process Name' like '%MsMpEng.exe' or 'Process Name' like '%svchost.exe' or 'Process Name' like '%TrustedInstaller.exe' or 'Process Name' like '%msiexec.exe') | stats count by 'Host Name (Server)', 'Process Name', 'Target Object'
splunk_original: index=sysmon EventCode=13 TargetObject IN ("*\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall*","*\\CurrentControlSet\\Services*","*SecurityCenter2*") NOT Image IN ("*MsMpEng.exe","*svchost.exe","*TrustedInstaller.exe") | table _time, Image, TargetObject, User
